tools.name: query_regulation
tools.description: Query Hong Kong SFC regulatory knowledge. Covers licensing (Type 1-13), compliance, exams, CPD/CPT, AML/CFT, virtual assets (VATP/ASPIRe), and more. Supports English and Chinese.

tools.name: search_enforcement
tools.description: Search SFC enforcement actions including fines, suspensions, bans, and prosecutions. Search by company, person, or violation type.

tools.name: latest_updates
tools.description: Get latest SFC regulatory updates: circulars, enforcement news, VATP developments, consultation papers.

tools.name: get_license_guide
tools.description: Comprehensive guide for a specific SFC license type: exam papers, capital requirements, fit-and-proper criteria, CPD hours.

tools.name: compliance_check
tools.description: Perform a compliance health check for a licensed corporation. Input company profile, get a compliance risk assessment covering FRR capital, RO configuration, MIC roles, annual obligations, and regulatory focus areas.

tools.name: risk_assessment
tools.description: Assess compliance risk of a planned business activity. Returns Red/Yellow/Green risk rating with regulatory basis and recommended actions.

tools.name: autonomous_task
tools.description: Execute a complex multi-step regulatory task autonomously. VIGO will plan the execution strategy, gather information from multiple sources (regulations, enforcement, knowledge graph), and synthesize a comprehensive report. Use for due diligence, compliance planning, license acquisition roadmaps, or

tools.name: checklist_lookup
tools.description: Search the SFC compliance checklist by topic, licence type, or MIC function (CF1-CF8). Returns compliance items with legal references, SOP guidance, case law, and grey area analysis. Use for questions about regulatory obligations, MIC responsibilities, procedural guidance, or compliance requirements

tools.name: sop_guide
tools.description: Get step-by-step Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) guidance for common compliance processes. Available SOPs: KYC onboarding, FRR monthly return, complaint handling, STR filing. Returns detailed steps with responsible person, legal basis, and estimated time.

tools.name: compliance_score
tools.description: Calculate compliance health score for a company. Requires company_id from the Portal system. Returns total items, completed, overdue, and score percentage.
